title: Gravestone: HeroTime X Create
description: a small compat mod that requires you craft the omnitrix and not call it from a factory far far away
body:
### **ABOUT**

This project is to cross the crossover of the century, Create the well known mechanical madness and Gravestone: HeroTime the weirdest ben 10 project out there melding into one.

in this adventure you dont call the omnitrix from a factory in deep space, YOU MAKE THE FACTORY!

the recipe change for the omnitrix completely removes the default way of obtainment and requires that the player craft the omnitrix from its parts, the omnitrix core is crafted on an assembly line and requires a galvan brain, the rest of the omnitrix is crafted from the galvanic alloy and omni crystals.

the intial release of this was made in a day so expect bugs and oddities, nothing is final as its only in beta so please recommend things you think could be improved and things that you think would be awesome to see on the discord!!

i recommend installing jei to see the recipe :D

### **OTHER INFO**

DISCORD : [https://discord.gg/jk5u6T5gbD](https://discord.gg/jk5u6T5gbD)
